title: Linking notifications to desktop version of Monday
excerpt: Hi all, my team all use a desktop version of Monday. Anyone know how to open links from notifications on the desktop version, rather than them opening a separate tab on your browser that links to each notification which …

posts.author: 949161 (MARIA MONTEVERDE)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi all, my team all use a desktop version of Monday. Anyone know how to open links from notifications on the desktop version, rather than them opening a separate tab on your browser that links to each notification which is so annoying.

posts.author: MsquareAutomation (Msquare Automation Solutions)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi@949161,
When you receive a notification with a link, hover your mouse cursor over the notification to reveal the link.
Once the link is visible, right-click on it to bring up the context menu.

Choose “Open link in new window” or “Open link in new tab”: From the context menu, select the option that allows you to open the link in a new window or a new tab within the Monday.com.

By following these steps, you should be able to open links from notifications within the Monday.com itself, rather than having them open in a separate tab on your browser.

hope its helpful to u.
